title: Beyth-Dagown #1016
definition:
Beth-dagon = "house of Dagon"

 1) the temple of Dagon in Judah
 2) the temple of Dagon in Asher
nasbUsage:
Definition: Beth-dagon = "house of Dagon"

 1) the temple of Dagon in Judah
 2) the temple of Dagon in Asher

    NASB:  house of Dagon, two places in Pal.
